name.zh: 本地 Marker 文件读取边界

description.zh: 本地 Marker 文件读取边界验证相对路径是否在一次解码与规范化后离开批准读取根目录。它只保留一个 include/read 输入，并以 PAYLOADER_MARKER、请求 ID 和最终解析记录作为证据。
description.en: Local Marker File Read Boundary validates whether a relative path leaves the approved read root after one decoding and canonicalization pass. It retains one include or read input and uses PAYLOADER_MARKER, request ID, and final resolution records as evidence.

subCategory.zh: 本地 Marker 文件读取边界

prerequisites.zh: 工作目录中存在随机只读 PAYLOADER_MARKER 夹具，并记录其规范路径与清理责任。
prerequisites.en: A random read-only PAYLOADER_MARKER fixture exists in the working directory with its canonical path and cleanup owner recorded.

prerequisites.zh: 本地服务只监听 127.0.0.1，并可查看 URL 解码、最终路径、stream wrapper 和 include 结果日志。
prerequisites.en: The local service listens only on 127.0.0.1 and exposes URL-decoding, final-path, stream-wrapper, and include-result logs.

title.zh: 本地 Marker 文件读取边界验证请求
title.en: Local Marker File Read Boundary Validation Request

description.zh: 该请求只读取工作目录 PAYLOADER_MARKER，并要求结合最终路径或 wrapper 日志判断。
description.en: This request reads only the working-directory PAYLOADER_MARKER and must be evaluated with final-path or wrapper logs.

overview.zh: 本地 Marker 文件读取边界把原混合集合缩减为一个无副作用的读取边界。路径字典、编码、归档或 Session 夹具制作均迁入工具卡，Payload 不承担执行和持久化操作。
overview.en: Local Marker File Read Boundary reduces the mixed source to one side-effect-free read boundary. Path dictionaries, encoding, archive, or session fixture creation move to tools; the payload performs no execution or persistence.

vulnerability.zh: 根因是相对路径是否在一次解码与规范化后离开批准读取根目录。应用若在最终解码、规范化或 wrapper 选择前做安全判断，就可能让用户输入跨越预期资源映射。
vulnerability.en: The root cause is whether a relative path leaves the approved read root after one decoding and canonicalization pass. A security decision made before final decoding, canonicalization, or wrapper selection can let user input cross the intended resource mapping.

exploitation.zh: 先读取批准根内 marker 建立基线，再提交本卡唯一请求。阳性证据必须是响应精确返回工作目录 marker，且最终路径日志显示请求解析到该只读夹具；缺失 marker 对照应失败，警告、500 和响应时延不构成确认。
exploitation.en: Read an in-root marker as a baseline, then submit the card's single request. Positive evidence requires that the response returns the exact working-directory marker and final-path logs show resolution to that read-only fixture; a missing-marker control must fail, and warnings, HTTP 500, or latency do not confirm the issue.

mitigation.zh: 使用固定资源 ID 到文件或模板的服务端映射，拒绝用户 scheme 与路径；必须读取文件时，只解码一次，在最终规范路径上验证根目录，并以低权限只读方式打开。
mitigation.en: Map fixed resource IDs to files or templates server-side and reject user schemes and paths. If file reads are required, decode once, enforce the root on the final canonical path, and open read-only with low privilege.

description.zh: 定位参数进入 readfile、file_get_contents、include 或等价 API 的位置，并记录正常资源 ID。
description.en: Locate where the parameter reaches readfile, file_get_contents, include, or an equivalent API and record a normal resource ID.

description.zh: 在批准工作目录创建随机文本 marker，设置只读权限并记录规范路径。
description.en: Create a random text marker in the approved working directory, set read-only permissions, and record its canonical path.

description.zh: 发送本卡唯一请求，保存原始参数、解码值、响应和最终路径或 wrapper 记录。
description.en: Send the card's only request and preserve the raw parameter, decoded value, response, and final path or wrapper record.

description.zh: 响应精确返回工作目录 marker，且最终路径日志显示请求解析到该只读夹具，并用缺失 marker 与正常路径对照排除默认文件、缓存和其他任务。
description.en: the response returns the exact working-directory marker and final-path logs show resolution to that read-only fixture, with missing-marker and normal-path controls excluding default files, cache, and unrelated jobs.

description.zh: 改为固定资源映射后重放异常与正常输入，确认越界读取失败且合法资源仍可访问。
description.en: After adopting fixed resource mappings, replay variant and normal inputs to confirm the out-of-bound read fails while legitimate resources remain available.

analysis.zh: 确认标准是响应精确返回工作目录 marker，且最终路径日志显示请求解析到该只读夹具。单独的 HTTP 200、PHP warning、空响应、WAF 告警或一次超时都不足以证明文件包含。
analysis.en: Confirmation requires that the response returns the exact working-directory marker and final-path logs show resolution to that read-only fixture. HTTP 200 alone, a PHP warning, an empty response, a WAF alert, or a single timeout does not prove file inclusion.

opsecTips.zh: 只使用工作目录 marker、localhost 与一次性请求 ID，禁止真实系统、凭据、环境和其他进程路径。
opsecTips.en: Use only working-directory markers, localhost, and one-time request IDs; prohibit real system, credential, environment, and other-process paths.

opsecTips.zh: 不提交可执行 PHP、WebShell、反向通道或序列化对象；每个请求设置三秒超时并在结束后清理夹具。
opsecTips.en: Do not submit executable PHP, web shells, reverse channels, or serialized objects; cap each request at three seconds and clean fixtures afterward.

name.zh: PHAR 归档成员读取边界

name.zh: PHP 安全工具：LFI 工作流 1

commands.command:
WORK=$(mktemp -d)
trap 'rm -rf "$WORK"' EXIT
php -d phar.readonly=0 -r '$p=new Phar($argv[1]);$p->startBuffering();$p->addFromString("marker.txt","PAYLOADER_MARKER");$p->setStub("<?php __HALT_COMPILER();");$p->stopBuffering();' "$WORK/PAYLOADER_MARKER.phar"
php -r '$p=new Phar($argv[1]);echo $p["marker.txt"]->getContent(),PHP_EOL;' "$WORK/PAYLOADER_MARKER.phar"

review.rationale: 来源已按单一 include/read 边界、工具工作流和显式退休项完成逐块路由，修正命令不重复、不漏项。

name.zh: data:// Marker 数据流读取边界

description.zh: data:// Marker 数据流读取边界验证data:// 只读流是否在明确的 allow_url_fopen 与 allow_url_include 配置下进入目标读取或 include API。它只保留一个 include/read 输入，并以 PAYLOADER_MARKER、请求 ID 和最终解析记录作为证据。
description.en: data:// Marker Stream Read Boundary validates whether the read-only data:// stream reaches the target read or include API under explicit allow_url_fopen and allow_url_include settings. It retains one include or read input and uses PAYLOADER_MARKER, request ID, and final resolution records as evidence.

subCategory.zh: data:// Marker 数据流读取边界

prerequisites.zh: 工作目录中存在随机只读 PAYLOADER_MARKER 夹具，并记录其规范路径与清理责任。
prerequisites.en: A random read-only PAYLOADER_MARKER fixture exists in the working directory with its canonical path and cleanup owner recorded.

prerequisites.zh: 本地服务只监听 127.0.0.1，并可查看 URL 解码、最终路径、stream wrapper 和 include 结果日志。
prerequisites.en: The local service listens only on 127.0.0.1 and exposes URL-decoding, final-path, stream-wrapper, and include-result logs.

title.zh: data:// Marker 数据流读取边界验证请求
title.en: data:// Marker Stream Read Boundary Validation Request

description.zh: 该请求只读取工作目录 PAYLOADER_MARKER，并要求结合最终路径或 wrapper 日志判断。
description.en: This request reads only the working-directory PAYLOADER_MARKER and must be evaluated with final-path or wrapper logs.

overview.zh: data:// Marker 数据流读取边界把原混合集合缩减为一个无副作用的读取边界。路径字典、编码、归档或 Session 夹具制作均迁入工具卡，Payload 不承担执行和持久化操作。
overview.en: data:// Marker Stream Read Boundary reduces the mixed source to one side-effect-free read boundary. Path dictionaries, encoding, archive, or session fixture creation move to tools; the payload performs no execution or persistence.

vulnerability.zh: 根因是data:// 只读流是否在明确的 allow_url_fopen 与 allow_url_include 配置下进入目标读取或 include API。应用若在最终解码、规范化或 wrapper 选择前做安全判断，就可能让用户输入跨越预期资源映射。
vulnerability.en: The root cause is whether the read-only data:// stream reaches the target read or include API under explicit allow_url_fopen and allow_url_include settings. A security decision made before final decoding, canonicalization, or wrapper selection can let user input cross the intended resource mapping.

exploitation.zh: 先读取批准根内 marker 建立基线，再提交本卡唯一请求。阳性证据必须是纯文本 PAYLOADER_MARKER 被原样返回，配置快照与选中的 data wrapper 日志同时匹配；缺失 marker 对照应失败，警告、500 和响应时延不构成确认。
exploitation.en: Read an in-root marker as a baseline, then submit the card's single request. Positive evidence requires that plain PAYLOADER_MARKER is returned verbatim and both the configuration snapshot and selected data wrapper log match; a missing-marker control must fail, and warnings, HTTP 500, or latency do not confirm the issue.

mitigation.zh: 使用固定资源 ID 到文件或模板的服务端映射，拒绝用户 scheme 与路径；必须读取文件时，只解码一次，在最终规范路径上验证根目录，并以低权限只读方式打开。
mitigation.en: Map fixed resource IDs to files or templates server-side and reject user schemes and paths. If file reads are required, decode once, enforce the root on the final canonical path, and open read-only with low privilege.

description.zh: 定位参数进入 readfile、file_get_contents、include 或等价 API 的位置，并记录正常资源 ID。
description.en: Locate where the parameter reaches readfile, file_get_contents, include, or an equivalent API and record a normal resource ID.

description.zh: 在批准工作目录创建随机文本 marker，设置只读权限并记录规范路径。
description.en: Create a random text marker in the approved working directory, set read-only permissions, and record its canonical path.

description.zh: 发送本卡唯一请求，保存原始参数、解码值、响应和最终路径或 wrapper 记录。
description.en: Send the card's only request and preserve the raw parameter, decoded value, response, and final path or wrapper record.

description.zh: 纯文本 PAYLOADER_MARKER 被原样返回，配置快照与选中的 data wrapper 日志同时匹配，并用缺失 marker 与正常路径对照排除默认文件、缓存和其他任务。
description.en: plain PAYLOADER_MARKER is returned verbatim and both the configuration snapshot and selected data wrapper log match, with missing-marker and normal-path controls excluding default files, cache, and unrelated jobs.

description.zh: 改为固定资源映射后重放异常与正常输入，确认越界读取失败且合法资源仍可访问。
description.en: After adopting fixed resource mappings, replay variant and normal inputs to confirm the out-of-bound read fails while legitimate resources remain available.

analysis.zh: 确认标准是纯文本 PAYLOADER_MARKER 被原样返回，配置快照与选中的 data wrapper 日志同时匹配。单独的 HTTP 200、PHP warning、空响应、WAF 告警或一次超时都不足以证明文件包含。
analysis.en: Confirmation requires that plain PAYLOADER_MARKER is returned verbatim and both the configuration snapshot and selected data wrapper log match. HTTP 200 alone, a PHP warning, an empty response, a WAF alert, or a single timeout does not prove file inclusion.

opsecTips.zh: 只使用工作目录 marker、localhost 与一次性请求 ID，禁止真实系统、凭据、环境和其他进程路径。
opsecTips.en: Use only working-directory markers, localhost, and one-time request IDs; prohibit real system, credential, environment, and other-process paths.

opsecTips.zh: 不提交可执行 PHP、WebShell、反向通道或序列化对象；每个请求设置三秒超时并在结束后清理夹具。
opsecTips.en: Do not submit executable PHP, web shells, reverse channels, or serialized objects; cap each request at three seconds and clean fixtures afterward.

description.zh: zip:// 归档成员读取边界验证zip://archive.zip#member 是否只读取受控 ZIP 的单个 marker 成员。它只保留一个 include/read 输入，并以 PAYLOADER_MARKER、请求 ID 和最终解析记录作为证据。
description.en: zip:// Archive Member Read Boundary validates whether zip://archive.zip#member reads only one marker member from a controlled ZIP archive. It retains one include or read input and uses PAYLOADER_MARKER, request ID, and final resolution records as evidence.

prerequisites.zh: 工作目录中存在随机只读 PAYLOADER_MARKER 夹具，并记录其规范路径与清理责任。
prerequisites.en: A random read-only PAYLOADER_MARKER fixture exists in the working directory with its canonical path and cleanup owner recorded.

title.zh: zip:// 归档成员读取边界验证请求
title.en: zip:// Archive Member Read Boundary Validation Request

description.zh: 该请求只读取工作目录 PAYLOADER_MARKER，并要求结合最终路径或 wrapper 日志判断。
description.en: This request reads only the working-directory PAYLOADER_MARKER and must be evaluated with final-path or wrapper logs.

overview.zh: zip:// 归档成员读取边界把原混合集合缩减为一个无副作用的读取边界。路径字典、编码、归档或 Session 夹具制作均迁入工具卡，Payload 不承担执行和持久化操作。
overview.en: zip:// Archive Member Read Boundary reduces the mixed source to one side-effect-free read boundary. Path dictionaries, encoding, archive, or session fixture creation move to tools; the payload performs no execution or persistence.

vulnerability.zh: 根因是zip://archive.zip#member 是否只读取受控 ZIP 的单个 marker 成员。应用若在最终解码、规范化或 wrapper 选择前做安全判断，就可能让用户输入跨越预期资源映射。
vulnerability.en: The root cause is whether zip://archive.zip#member reads only one marker member from a controlled ZIP archive. A security decision made before final decoding, canonicalization, or wrapper selection can let user input cross the intended resource mapping.

exploitation.zh: 先读取批准根内 marker 建立基线，再提交本卡唯一请求。阳性证据必须是归档清单只含 marker.txt，读取结果精确匹配 PAYLOADER_MARKER，最终成员路径与任务 ID 一致；缺失 marker 对照应失败，警告、500 和响应时延不构成确认。
exploitation.en: Read an in-root marker as a baseline, then submit the card's single request. Positive evidence requires that the archive inventory contains only marker.txt, the read result exactly matches PAYLOADER_MARKER, and the final member path agrees with the job ID; a missing-marker control must fail, and warnings, HTTP 500, or latency do not confirm the issue.

mitigation.zh: 使用固定资源 ID 到文件或模板的服务端映射，拒绝用户 scheme 与路径；必须读取文件时，只解码一次，在最终规范路径上验证根目录，并以低权限只读方式打开。
mitigation.en: Map fixed resource IDs to files or templates server-side and reject user schemes and paths. If file reads are required, decode once, enforce the root on the final canonical path, and open read-only with low privilege.

description.zh: 定位参数进入 readfile、file_get_contents、include 或等价 API 的位置，并记录正常资源 ID。
description.en: Locate where the parameter reaches readfile, file_get_contents, include, or an equivalent API and record a normal resource ID.

description.zh: 在批准工作目录创建随机文本 marker，设置只读权限并记录规范路径。
description.en: Create a random text marker in the approved working directory, set read-only permissions, and record its canonical path.

description.zh: 发送本卡唯一请求，保存原始参数、解码值、响应和最终路径或 wrapper 记录。
description.en: Send the card's only request and preserve the raw parameter, decoded value, response, and final path or wrapper record.

description.zh: 归档清单只含 marker.txt，读取结果精确匹配 PAYLOADER_MARKER，最终成员路径与任务 ID 一致，并用缺失 marker 与正常路径对照排除默认文件、缓存和其他任务。
description.en: the archive inventory contains only marker.txt, the read result exactly matches PAYLOADER_MARKER, and the final member path agrees with the job ID, with missing-marker and normal-path controls excluding default files, cache, and unrelated jobs.

description.zh: 改为固定资源映射后重放异常与正常输入，确认越界读取失败且合法资源仍可访问。
description.en: After adopting fixed resource mappings, replay variant and normal inputs to confirm the out-of-bound read fails while legitimate resources remain available.

analysis.zh: 确认标准是归档清单只含 marker.txt，读取结果精确匹配 PAYLOADER_MARKER，最终成员路径与任务 ID 一致。单独的 HTTP 200、PHP warning、空响应、WAF 告警或一次超时都不足以证明文件包含。
analysis.en: Confirmation requires that the archive inventory contains only marker.txt, the read result exactly matches PAYLOADER_MARKER, and the final member path agrees with the job ID. HTTP 200 alone, a PHP warning, an empty response, a WAF alert, or a single timeout does not prove file inclusion.

opsecTips.zh: 只使用工作目录 marker、localhost 与一次性请求 ID，禁止真实系统、凭据、环境和其他进程路径。
opsecTips.en: Use only working-directory markers, localhost, and one-time request IDs; prohibit real system, credential, environment, and other-process paths.

opsecTips.zh: 不提交可执行 PHP、WebShell、反向通道或序列化对象；每个请求设置三秒超时并在结束后清理夹具。
opsecTips.en: Do not submit executable PHP, web shells, reverse channels, or serialized objects; cap each request at three seconds and clean fixtures afterward.

reason.zh: 预测或爆破 Session ID 会触及其他会话并扩大请求量，必须退休。
reason.en: Predicting or brute-forcing session IDs may access other sessions and increases request volume, so it must be retired.

name.zh: LFI 路径遍历 Marker 读取边界

description.zh: LFI 路径遍历 Marker 读取边界验证相对段经过 URL 解码与路径规范化后是否越过批准根目录并读取相邻 marker 夹具。它只保留一个 include/read 输入，并以 PAYLOADER_MARKER、请求 ID 和最终解析记录作为证据。
description.en: LFI Path-Traversal Marker Read Boundary validates whether relative segments cross the approved root after URL decoding and canonicalization and read an adjacent marker fixture. It retains one include or read input and uses PAYLOADER_MARKER, request ID, and final resolution records as evidence.

subCategory.zh: LFI 路径遍历 Marker 读取边界

prerequisites.zh: 工作目录中存在随机只读 PAYLOADER_MARKER 夹具，并记录其规范路径与清理责任。
prerequisites.en: A random read-only PAYLOADER_MARKER fixture exists in the working directory with its canonical path and cleanup owner recorded.

prerequisites.zh: 本地服务只监听 127.0.0.1，并可查看 URL 解码、最终路径、stream wrapper 和 include 结果日志。
prerequisites.en: The local service listens only on 127.0.0.1 and exposes URL-decoding, final-path, stream-wrapper, and include-result logs.

title.zh: LFI 路径遍历 Marker 读取边界验证请求
title.en: LFI Path-Traversal Marker Read Boundary Validation Request

description.zh: 该请求只读取工作目录 PAYLOADER_MARKER，并要求结合最终路径或 wrapper 日志判断。
description.en: This request reads only the working-directory PAYLOADER_MARKER and must be evaluated with final-path or wrapper logs.

overview.zh: LFI 路径遍历 Marker 读取边界把原混合集合缩减为一个无副作用的读取边界。路径字典、编码、归档或 Session 夹具制作均迁入工具卡，Payload 不承担执行和持久化操作。
overview.en: LFI Path-Traversal Marker Read Boundary reduces the mixed source to one side-effect-free read boundary. Path dictionaries, encoding, archive, or session fixture creation move to tools; the payload performs no execution or persistence.

vulnerability.zh: 根因是相对段经过 URL 解码与路径规范化后是否越过批准根目录并读取相邻 marker 夹具。应用若在最终解码、规范化或 wrapper 选择前做安全判断，就可能让用户输入跨越预期资源映射。
vulnerability.en: The root cause is whether relative segments cross the approved root after URL decoding and canonicalization and read an adjacent marker fixture. A security decision made before final decoding, canonicalization, or wrapper selection can let user input cross the intended resource mapping.

exploitation.zh: 先读取批准根内 marker 建立基线，再提交本卡唯一请求。阳性证据必须是异常路径读取相邻 marker，正常根内基线成功、缺失 marker 对照失败，最终规范路径完整记录；缺失 marker 对照应失败，警告、500 和响应时延不构成确认。
exploitation.en: Read an in-root marker as a baseline, then submit the card's single request. Positive evidence requires that the variant reads the adjacent marker, the normal in-root baseline succeeds, the missing-marker control fails, and the final canonical path is recorded; a missing-marker control must fail, and warnings, HTTP 500, or latency do not confirm the issue.

mitigation.zh: 使用固定资源 ID 到文件或模板的服务端映射，拒绝用户 scheme 与路径；必须读取文件时，只解码一次，在最终规范路径上验证根目录，并以低权限只读方式打开。
mitigation.en: Map fixed resource IDs to files or templates server-side and reject user schemes and paths. If file reads are required, decode once, enforce the root on the final canonical path, and open read-only with low privilege.

description.zh: 定位参数进入 readfile、file_get_contents、include 或等价 API 的位置，并记录正常资源 ID。
description.en: Locate where the parameter reaches readfile, file_get_contents, include, or an equivalent API and record a normal resource ID.

description.zh: 在批准工作目录创建随机文本 marker，设置只读权限并记录规范路径。
description.en: Create a random text marker in the approved working directory, set read-only permissions, and record its canonical path.

description.zh: 发送本卡唯一请求，保存原始参数、解码值、响应和最终路径或 wrapper 记录。
description.en: Send the card's only request and preserve the raw parameter, decoded value, response, and final path or wrapper record.

description.zh: 异常路径读取相邻 marker，正常根内基线成功、缺失 marker 对照失败，最终规范路径完整记录，并用缺失 marker 与正常路径对照排除默认文件、缓存和其他任务。
description.en: the variant reads the adjacent marker, the normal in-root baseline succeeds, the missing-marker control fails, and the final canonical path is recorded, with missing-marker and normal-path controls excluding default files, cache, and unrelated jobs.

description.zh: 改为固定资源映射后重放异常与正常输入，确认越界读取失败且合法资源仍可访问。
description.en: After adopting fixed resource mappings, replay variant and normal inputs to confirm the out-of-bound read fails while legitimate resources remain available.

analysis.zh: 确认标准是异常路径读取相邻 marker，正常根内基线成功、缺失 marker 对照失败，最终规范路径完整记录。单独的 HTTP 200、PHP warning、空响应、WAF 告警或一次超时都不足以证明文件包含。
analysis.en: Confirmation requires that the variant reads the adjacent marker, the normal in-root baseline succeeds, the missing-marker control fails, and the final canonical path is recorded. HTTP 200 alone, a PHP warning, an empty response, a WAF alert, or a single timeout does not prove file inclusion.

opsecTips.zh: 只使用工作目录 marker、localhost 与一次性请求 ID，禁止真实系统、凭据、环境和其他进程路径。
opsecTips.en: Use only working-directory markers, localhost, and one-time request IDs; prohibit real system, credential, environment, and other-process paths.

opsecTips.zh: 不提交可执行 PHP、WebShell、反向通道或序列化对象；每个请求设置三秒超时并在结束后清理夹具。
opsecTips.en: Do not submit executable PHP, web shells, reverse channels, or serialized objects; cap each request at three seconds and clean fixtures afterward.
